content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.multimodal.audio_engine
FILE: cosmos/core/multimodal/audio_engine.py (379 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: 12D AUDIO ENGINE (AUDITORY CORTEX)
==================================
Physics-based audio embedding and learning system.
Author: Cory Shane Davis (Implemented by Antigravity)

CLASSES:
- Audio12DEmbedding: 12-dimensional audio embedding
  Methods: def to_vector(self)
- MusicalLightToken: Complete light token
  Methods: def spectral_similarity(self, other)
- SpectralMemory: Vector database for tokens
  Methods: def add_token(self, token)
  Methods: def find_similar(self, query_token, k=5)
- LorenzAttractor: Chaos dynamics
  Methods: def step(self)
- AudioLearningSystem: Complete 12D audio learning system
  Methods: def process_audio(self, audio_chunk)
  Methods: def generate_response(self, user_audio)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def compute_fft(audio, sample_rate)
- def extract_fundamental_frequency(audio, sample_rate)
- def spectral_centroid(audio, sample_rate)
- def spectral_spread(audio, sample_rate)
- def extract_mfccs(audio, sample_rate, n_mfcc=13)
- def spectral_entropy(audio, sample_rate)
- def generate_phi_harmonics(fundamental, num_harmonics=12)
- def segment_audio(audio, sample_rate)
- def create_12d_embedding(audio, sample_rate)
